deviations.what: Breadth-probe: a minimal sap.m.upload.UploadSet (file upload list) with 3 pre-populated items + a toolbar. The actual upload backend, the full toolbar and the item action buttons are simplified; upload here would target the abap2UI5 FileUploader path in a live system.

structural_diff.reason: breadth/capability probe — renders the control but is not a faithful 1:1 rebuild of the full sample
